reasoning: XLK -1.22% + XLF -2.01% (financial stress) while XLE +1.67% = classic risk-off rotation. Growth and financial sectors leading SPY lower, while energy rallies in defensive pivot. SPY -1.31% lags XLF weakness but outperforms worst sector, suggesting measured bearish bias rather than capitulation. Energy strength offers tactical support but does not offset the two-sector selloff.
key_observations: XLK -1.22%: tech weakness but not catastrophic
XLF -2.01%: financial sector significantly underperforming — rate/credit concerns
XLE +1.67%: defensive energy rally in response to risk-off
Overall rotation: risk_off — growth + financials down, energy up
